homeError: Couldn’t load your home. Try again later.
homeNoPlan: your coach hasn’t assigned you a plan yet
homeLinkCuenta: Link up with your coach in Account ›
homeCheckinDoneSub: Thanks for logging · you can edit it whenever
titularNoneMsg: There are no logs yet to read your state. Your first check-in starts building your baseline — with no history, we don’t make up a state.
titularOkMsg: Your recovery is in your normal range. Keep following the plan.
titularWarnMsg: Your recovery is a bit below your normal. Today drop the intensity a notch and prioritize sleep.
titularAlertMsg: Your recovery is well below your normal. Today it’s best to ease off — talk to your coach.
tipFooter: {source} · educational material, not a replacement for your coach
caminoNoPlanTitle: You don’t have a plan assigned yet
caminoNoPlanBody: When your coach assigns you a macrocycle, you’ll see your road to the next competition here.
caminoSub: macro track · each bar = one week · gold outline = competition
semAllDone: ✓ You logged the whole week — tap a day to edit.
semTapRegister: tap a day to log your workout
semInOrder: Complete the days in order to continue.
semWeekTotal: This week: {kg} kg · {done}/{total} {count, plural, one {session} other {sessions}}
